mapper.select: SELECT country FROM sakila.country ORDER BY country
SELECT ci.city_id AS cityId, ci.city AS cityName, co.country AS countryName FROM sakila.city ci JOIN sakila.country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id ORDER BY co.country, ci.city

SELECT c.customer_id AS customerId, c.first_name AS firstName, c.last_name AS lastName, c.email AS email, c.active AS active, a.address AS address, a.district AS district, ci.city AS city, co.country AS country, a.postal_code AS postalCode, a.phone AS phone, c.store_id AS storeId FROM sakila.customer c JOIN sakila.address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id JOIN sakila.city ci ON a.city_id = ci.city_id JOIN sakila.country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id WHERE c.customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT c.customer_id AS customerId, c.first_name AS firstName, c.last_name AS lastName, c.email AS email, c.active AS active, ci.city AS city, co.country AS country
FROM sakila.customer c JOIN sakila.address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id JOIN sakila.city ci ON a.city_id = ci.city_id JOIN sakila.country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id
AND c.last_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lastName}, '%')
AND c.first_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{firstName}, '%')
AND c.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%')
AND c.active = #{active}
AND co.country = #{country}
ORDER BY c.customer_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sakila.address (address, address2, district, city_id, postal_code, phone, location, last_update) VALUES (#{address}, NULL, #{district}, #{cityId}, #{postalCode}, #{phone}, ST_GeomFromText('POINT(0 0)'), NOW())

INSERT INTO sakila.customer (store_id, first_name, last_name, email, address_id, active, create_date, last_update) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{email}, #{addressId}, #{active}, NOW(), NOW())
